hooks.command: python -c "import os,runpy,sys; root=os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); source='codex' if os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT') else 'claude'; script=os.path.join(root,'scripts','hook_router.py'); sys.path.insert(0,os.path.dirname(script)); sys.argv=[script,'--source',source,'--event','SessionStart']; runpy.run_path(script,run_name='__main__')"

python -c "import os,runpy,sys; root=os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT'); source='codex' if os.environ.get('PLUGIN_ROOT') else 'claude'; script=os.path.join(root,'scripts','hook_router.py'); sys.path.insert(0,os.path.dirname(script)); sys.argv=[script,'--source',source,'--event','PreToolUse']; runpy.run_path(script,run_name='__main__')"
